---
title: "Smart Face Recognizing Locking System"
subtitle: "An intelligent face-recognition-based locking system using OpenCV and Arduino"
author: ""
date: "2018-09-01"
categories: [Face Recognition, OpenCV, Arduino, IoT, Security System]
image: featured.png
citation: false
comments: false
toc: true
---

This project developed a smart locking system based on face recognition. The system was designed to identify authorized users through facial features and control a physical lock mechanism.

The project was developed during **Utkranti 1.0**, organized at GUIST, Guwahati.

## System Concept

Face Image → Face Recognition → Authorized/Unauthorized Decision → Arduino → Lock Control

## Key Features

- Face recognition-based authentication
- Automatic locking and unlocking mechanism
- Integration of computer vision with hardware control
- Prototype implementation using OpenCV and Arduino

## Tools and Technologies

- OpenCV
- Arduino
- Python
- Face Recognition
- Embedded System Prototype
